options.content:
# Predictor REST Api

```bash
kubectl port-forward -nkeda svc/kedify-predictor 8000
```

Some selected endpoints:
- http://localhost:8000 (Scagger docs w/ all the REST endpoints)
- http://localhost:8000/redoc (ReDoc docs)
- http://localhost:8000/models (List all models)
- http://localhost:8000/models/mm-in-ten (Get model info for 'mm-in-ten' model)
- http://localhost:8000/models/mm-in-ten/graph (Matplotlib graph of trained predictive model)
- http://localhost:8000/models/mm-in-ten/graphComponents (Predictive model decomposed to its seasonal components)
